ddls:
CREATE TABLE "egg_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "observed_month" TEXT /* Date of the observation (end of the month) */,
  "prod_type" TEXT /* Type of poultry product (e.g., hatching eggs) */,
  "prod_process" TEXT /* Production process type (e.g., all, organic) */,
  "n_hens" INTEGER /* Number of hens contributing to the production */,
  "n_eggs" INTEGER /* Total number of eggs produced during the month */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source document containing the production data */,
  "avg_eggs_per_hen" TEXT /* Average eggs produced per hen during the month */,
  "hen_mortality_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of hens that died during the month */,
  "feed_consumption" TEXT /* Total feed consumed by hens during the month */,
  "avg_feed_cost" TEXT /* Average cost of feed per unit */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the farms table */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the batches table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_egg_production_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_egg_production_prod_process FOREIGN KEY ("prod_process") REFERENCES processes ("process_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_egg_production_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("file_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_egg_production_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_egg_production_prod_type FOREIGN KEY ("prod_type") REFERENCES products ("product_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the poultry product (e.g., hatching eggs) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., poultry, egg) */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product (e.g., hatching eggs, table eggs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the production process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process */,
  "process_category" TEXT /* Category of the process (e.g., production, processing) */,
  "process_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the process (e.g., organic, non-organic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source document */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the source document */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the source document was uploaded */,
  "source_author" TEXT /* Author of the source document */,
  "source_publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the source document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization (e.g., manager, analyst) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of access to production data (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., production, management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm */,
  "farm_location" TEXT /* Location of the farm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name of the batch */,
  "batch_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the batch */,
  "batch_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id")
)
